category_sources: source_facts.description says FileQL runs SQL-like queries on local files using the GitQL SDK; official GitHub README describes the same local-file query tool.

docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; the official GitHub README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/AmrDeveloper/FileQL; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
